iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 7% (stable). Day 18 18:00 UTC - DETERRENT. War continues but no nuclear escalation signals. FM Araghchi rejects diplomacy, says Hormuz 'open' but not for US/allies. No enrichment news, no IAEA emergency. Nuclear track stable despite conventional war.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 18 18:00 UTC - %. Israel announces wide-scale strikes across Tehran. Two Iranian attack salvos reported. Dubai explosions heard again, UAE briefly closed airspace. FM Araghchi: Hormuz 'open' but not for US/Israel/allies; diplomacy 'delusional'. Oil >$100/bbl. 1,444 killed in Iran. Trump postponing China trip. Brent >$100. No ceasefire.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 18 18:00 UTC - %. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran + Beirut simultaneously. Major battle at Khiam (strategic Hezbollah stronghold). Katz draws explicit Gaza comparison (Rafah/Beit Hanoun). 912 killed, 1M+ displaced. 3 UNIFIL peacekeepers wounded. IDF 91st division ground ops on multiple axes. HRW: forced displacement risk = war crime.

top_signals: Israel announces 'wide-scale wave of strikes' across Tehran AND escalates Lebanon bombardment
Two incoming Iranian attack salvos reported by Israel
Explosions heard over Dubai; UAE briefly closes airspace before reopening
Iran FM Araghchi: Hormuz 'open' but NOT for US/Israel/allies — diplomatic track called 'delusional'
Lebanon death toll rises to 912 killed, 2,000+ injured; 1M+ displaced
Major battle at Khiam — IDF 91st division ground ops on multiple axes in southern Lebanon
3 UNIFIL peacekeepers wounded in Israeli strikes on Lebanon
Katz draws explicit Gaza comparison for Lebanon operations (Rafah/Beit Hanoun analogy)
Trump may postpone China trip — Iran war consuming all bandwidth
1,444 killed in Iran from US-Israeli strikes since Feb 28
Amnesty confirms US strike killed 170+ at Minab primary school (mostly schoolgirls)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 18 18:00): ZERO de-escalation signals. Iran FM calls diplomacy 'delusional'. Hormuz effectively blockaded. Israel wide-scale strikes on Tehran. Lebanon ground invasion expanding. Oil >$100. No ceasefire in ANY theater.

latest_news.headline: Large explosions in northern Tehran near Saadabad Palace — strikes across central Tehran, Karaj, Shahriar, Shiraz, Arak
latest_news.text: Large explosions reported near Saadabad Palace complex in northern Tehran. Follows earlier strikes on central Tehran, Karaj, Shahriar, Shiraz, Arak. War entering Day 18.

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll passes 1,444 — 18,551 injured since Feb 28
latest_news.text: At least 1,444 killed and 18,551 injured by US-Israeli attacks on Iran since Feb 28. Amnesty confirms US attack on Minab primary school killed 170+, mostly schoolgirls.

latest_news.headline: Qatar intercepts 13 of 14 Iranian ballistic missiles — Bahrain neutralizes 129 missiles, 221 drones
latest_news.text: Qatar intercepts 13 of 14 ballistic missiles from Iran. Bahrain reports 129 missiles and 221 drones neutralized since war began. Saudi intercepts 12 drones in Eastern region.

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah attacks Nahariya, Israel — shrapnel falls on Jerusalem holy sites (Al-Aqsa, Holy Sepulchre)
latest_news.text: Hezbollah launches attack on northern Israeli city of Nahariya, one wounded. Missile and interceptor fragments found at holy sites in Jerusalem Old City near Al-Aqsa Mosque and Church of the Holy Sepulchre.

latest_news.headline: Iran President Pezeshkian: Iran will not surrender to 'bullies' — asserts right to self-defense
latest_news.text: Iranian President Pezeshkian defends Tehran's right to self-defence, says Iran did not start the war and will not surrender. Hardening rhetoric after Larijani assassination.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 18, 17:04 UTC) — Day 18 of Iran war. Tehran under sustained bombardment (Saadabad Palace struck). 1,444+ killed in Iran. Amnesty confirms US strike killed 170+ at Minab school. Hezbollah fires on Nahariya; shrapnel at Jerusalem holy sites. Qatar intercepts 13/14 missiles. Kuwait arrests Hezbollah cell. Trump pressures UK/France on Hormuz. Pezeshkian: 'will not surrender'. UAE reopens airspace. Oil still ~$100/bbl. No ceasefire in any theater.
